sample.title: Double Lover
sample.plot: Disenchanted with the ephemeral glamour of the modelling world, Chloé, a vulnerable Parisian woman of 25, is convinced that the severe and persistent abdominal pains she's been suffering, stem mainly from a psychosomatic disorder. As a result, the reserved beauty will soon find herself on the couch of the charming therapist, Dr Paul Meyer, nevertheless, the mutual and unfailing sexual attraction between them will make it impossible to continue with the therapy. Before long, the ecstatic, yet unexplored lovers will move in together, however, Paul's obscure past will inevitably lead Chloé to the conclusion that there's definitely more to him than meets the eye. Is the doe-eyed woman lured into a world of hallucinations and dream-like sequences?

sample.title: In from the Side
sample.plot: Following a drunken encounter, two equally attached men from a cash strapped and divided gay rugby club unwittingly sleepwalk into an adulterous affair but must conceal their growing feelings or risk destroying the club they love.

sample.title: The Father
sample.plot: Having just scared off his recent caregiver, Anthony, an ailing, octogenarian Londoner gradually succumbing to dementia, feels abandoned when concerned Anne, his daughter, tells him she's moving to Paris. Confused and upset, against the backdrop of a warped perspective and his rapid, heart-rending mental decline, Anthony is starting to lose his grip on reality, struggling to navigate the opaque landscape of present and past. Now, as faded memories and glimpses of lucidity trigger sudden mood swings, dear ones, Anthony's surroundings, and even time itself become distorted. Why has his younger daughter stopped visiting? Who are the strangers that burst in on Anthony?

sample.title: Prey
sample.plot: On his bachelor party weekend, Roman, his brother Albert and their friends go on a hiking trip into the wild. When the group hears gunshots nearby, they attribute them to hunters in the woods. However, they soon find themselves in a desperate bid for survival when they realize that they have fallen prey to a mysterious shooter.

sample.title: Accused
sample.plot: After a revenge obsessed society incorrectly selects its next target, a young man must survive the night as the online witch-hunt arrives at his front door.

sample.title: Time Still Turns the Pages
sample.plot: A schoolteacher re-lives painful childhood memories after discovering concerning information about an at-risk student.

sample.title: Kidnapping Stella
sample.plot: Snatched off the street and held for ransom, a bound and gagged woman uses her limited powers to derail her two masked abductors' carefully-laid plans.

sample.title: Anatomy of a Fall
sample.plot: A woman is suspected of murder after her husband's death; their half-blind son faces a moral dilemma as the main witness.

sample.title: The Great Hack
sample.plot: The Cambridge Analytica scandal is examined through the roles of several affected persons.

sample.title: The Foreigner
sample.plot: The story of humble London businessman Quan (Chan), whose long-buried past erupts in a revenge-fueled vendetta when the only person left for him to love - his teenage daughter - is taken from him in a senseless act of politically-motivated terrorism. In his relentless search for the identity of the terrorists, Quan is forced into a cat- and-mouse conflict with a Irish government official (Brosnan), whose own past may hold clues to the identities of the elusive killers.

sample.title: Good People
sample.plot: Anna and Tom, a married couple living a normal life want to start a family but are struggling financially. Then, just as they are about to lose their apartment, their tenant who had been renting their basement dies and they find a lot of money hidden there. The money belongs to a very dangerous man who naturally wants it back and both Tom and Anna have to decide whether to keep the money and risk their lives or give the money to the cops and start all over again.

sample.title: A Classic Horror Story
sample.plot: Five carpoolers travel in a motorhome to reach a common destination. Night falls, and to avoid a dead animal carcass, they crash into a tree. When they come to their senses, they find themselves in the middle of nowhere. The road they were traveling on has disappeared and there is only a dense, impenetrable forest and a wooden house in the middle of a clearing, which they discover is the home of a spine-chilling cult.

sample.title: Retribution
sample.plot: A bank executive receives a bomb threat while driving his children to school that his car will explode if they stop and get out.

sample.title: The Jack in the Box: Awakening
sample.plot: When a vintage Jack-in-the-box is opened by a dying woman, she enters into a deal with the demon within that would see her illness cured in return for helping it claim six innocent victims.

sample.title: Head to Head
sample.plot: Hilarity meets danger when a lovesick chauffeur and a bootleg mechanic mistakenly pick up a retired crime lord, igniting a wild, life-changing adventure.

sample.title: Elle
sample.plot: Michèle seems indestructible. Head of a successful video game company, she brings the same ruthless attitude to her love life as to business. Being attacked in her home by an unknown assailant changes Michèle's life forever. When she resolutely tracks the man down, they are both drawn into a curious and thrilling game-a game that may, at any moment, spiral out of control.

sample.title: Book Club: The Next Chapter
sample.plot: Follows the new journey of four best friends as they take their book club to Italy for the fun girls trip they never had.

sample.title: Boys
sample.plot: A sexually awakening gay teen athlete finds himself in a budding relationship with his mutually attracted relay race teammate.

sample.title: Mortadelo and Filemon: Mission Implausible
sample.plot: A criminal produces an uncontrollable laughter to the population and Mortadelo and Filemón will have to stop him.

sample.title: Old People
sample.plot: A woman travels home with her two kids for her sister's wedding but finds herself defending her family against blood-seeking pensioners.

sample.title: Rock'n Roll
sample.plot: Having every reason to be happy, forty-three-year-old father-of-one Guillaume Canet sees his world turn upside down when Camille, his young and fresh co-star, makes him feel like a sad has-been. Now, bent on proving her wrong, insecure Guillaume is eager to go to extreme lengths to change everything and regain his long-lost sex appeal, of course, behind the back of his significant other, Marion Cotillard. However, as the situation spins out of control, a drastic, uncontrollable transformation takes place, much to the horror of the cast and crew. But, above all, Guillaume wants to be cool again. How hard can it be?

sample.title: Official Competition
sample.plot: A billionaire businessman in search of fame and social prestige decides to make a unique, groundbreaking film. To achieve this goal, he hires the best of the best: A stellar team consisting of the famous filmmaker Lola Cuevas and two well-known actors who boast not only an enormous talent, but also an even bigger ego: Hollywood star Félix Rivero and aging theater thespian Iván Torres. They're both legends, but not exactly the best of friends. Through a series of increasingly hilarious tests set by Lola, Félix and Iván must confront not only each other, but also their own legacies.

sample.title: The Gentlemen. Mini Version
sample.plot: N/A

sample.title: Sex Games
sample.plot: A rich couple often spices up their sexual relationship by doing their so-called Sex Games. But when they meet a new set of ''playmates''- a conservative couple, their game becomes more challenging.

sample.title: The Stalker
sample.plot: Who is he? What does he want? When will he strike again? These are the questions that haunt Steve and Wendy Hamilton as they race to get out of town, after one mistake leads to the next. The man only known as the Stalker, is looking for them and their children. He is willing to kill anyone who gets in his way. Embark on this horror, mystery, thrill ride, that takes you back to the classic films of the genre.

sample.title: Deadly Infidelity
sample.plot: Infidelity is a drama/thriller about an annual dinner party between three former friends and their wives. The only things that keeps these men in the same room is the .COM start-up that made them rich; the annual dinner party is the last facade of their friendship, and this year a death threat will turn everyone against each other. Everyone's dirty secrets will be exposed, including the wives who've been cheated on and with whom, and the money they've stolen.

sample.title: London Has Fallen
sample.plot: After the British Prime Minister has passed away under mysterious circumstances, all leaders of the Western world must attend his funeral. But what starts out as the most protected event on earth, turns into a deadly plot to kill the world's most powerful leaders and unleash a terrifying vision of the future. The President of the United States, his formidable secret service head and a British MI-6 agent who trusts no one are the only people that have any hope of stopping it.

sample.title: Cats in the Museum
sample.plot: The cat Vincent and mouse friend escape a flood in a harpsichord, arriving at the Hermitage. Elite guard cats protect the art from mice. When the Mona Lisa arrives, Vincent must stop it being stolen and win over Cleopatra cat.

sample.title: The Weekend Away
sample.plot: Two best friends, Kate and Beth who have overcome personal setbacks and no matter what life throws at them, they always look forward to their annual weekend way. This year they are on a trip to Croatia, and everything is perfect until Beth wakes up to find Kate missing. With only a fuzzy memory of the previous night and the police not helping, her frantic search uncovers devastating secrets closer to home.

sample.title: Attraction
sample.plot: An alien spaceship, following an accident in space, enters the earth atmosphere and being damaged by Russian fighter jets, crash lands in a populated area of Moscow taking a few hundred human lives in the crash. A school girl saves the life of one of the aliens and together must deal with humans who intend them harm.

sample.title: Prey for the Devil
sample.plot: According to real-life Vatican reports, occurrences of demonic possession have increased significantly in recent years. In response, the Catholic church has secretly reopened exorcism schools to train priests in the sacred rite. The Devil's Light immerses you into the world of one of these schools; humanity's last line of defense against the powers of everlasting evil. Jacqueline Byers ("Roadies," "Salvation") stars as Sister Ann, who devoutly believes that performing exorcisms is her calling, despite the fact that historically only priests - not sisters - are allowed to perform them. When one professor senses her special gift, allowing her to be the first nun to study and master the ritual, her own soul will be in danger as the demonic forces she battles reveal a mysterious connection to her traumatic past.

sample.title: Scarlett
sample.plot: A college student must draw upon all the skills her spy-father taught her to protect herself and save her father from weapons dealers.

sample.title: The Difference Between Us
sample.plot: Alex Watson is a young black man, raised in the secluded Highlands of Scotland by white adoptive parents. When Alex moves to Glasgow, he must leave his protective bubble behind and learn what being black in the modern world truly ...

sample.title: Eliminators
sample.plot: A former US Federal Agent must abandon the witness protection program and come out of hiding when his London home is invaded in error due to a wrong address. When the event ends with multiple homicides, the news triggers those hunting him to send Europe's most dangerous assassin to kill him. Now on the run with his daughter's life in jeopardy, a determined father must get her to safety before the people he's been hiding from track him down.

sample.title: Ronaldo
sample.plot: Filmed over 14 months with unprecedented access into the inner circle of the man and the sport, this is the first official and fully authorized film of one of the most celebrated figures in football. For the first time ever, the world gets vividly candid and un-paralleled, behind-closed-doors access to the footballer, father, family-man and friend in this moving & fascinating documentary. Through in-depth conversations, state of the art football footage and never before seen archival footage, the film gives an astonishing insight into the sporting and personal life of double Ballon D'Or winner Cristiano Ronaldo at the peak of his career.

sample.title: My Big Fat Greek Wedding 3
sample.plot: After the death of the family's patriarch, Toula attempts to locate her father's childhood friends in Greece for a family reunion.

sample.title: Red Sparrow
sample.plot: A young Russian intelligence officer is assigned to seduce a first-tour CIA agent who handles the CIA's most sensitive penetration of Russian intelligence. The two young officers collide in a charged atmosphere of trade-craft, deception, and inevitably forbidden passion that threatens not just their lives but the lives of others as well.

sample.title: Cave
sample.plot: Three friends - Adrian, Charlotte and Viktor - head out into the Norwegian wilderness to explore a cave. They are all experienced at this sort of thing and have planned well. Relationship issues - Charlotte is with Adrian but she and Viktor used to be a couple and he still has feelings for her - complicate the expedition. Moreover, someone seems to be following them, even in the cave.

sample.title: The Mercator Trail
sample.plot: When the digital mad Benjamin turns 18, he inherits a box of ancient artefacts from his missing father. He gives an antique book to Slien, the girl he has his eye on, and unintentionally sets a chain reaction in motion. An old man called Zeppos is also very interested in the book which once belonged to the cartographer Mercator. Using the secret messages in Mercator's book, the trio uncovers the mystery while having to stay one step ahead of a mysterious rival.

sample.title: Two Is a Family
sample.plot: Samuel parties hard in the Marseille area of France and is awoken one morning by a woman carrying a baby she claims is his. She drives off leaving him with a wailing infant; he gives chase to London where he finds work and raises Gloria by himself.

sample.title: Accident Man: Hitman's Holiday
sample.plot: Mike Fallon, aka The Accident Man, is back and this time he must best the top assassins in the world, to protect the ungrateful son of a mafia boss, save the life of his only friend and rekindle his relationship with his maniacal father figure.

sample.title: I Came By
sample.plot: Follows a young graffiti artist who discovers a shocking secret that would put him and the ones closest to him in danger.

sample.title: Goodnight Mommy
sample.plot: In a lonesome house in the countryside between woods and cornfields live nine-year-old twin brothers who are waiting for their mother in the heat of summer. When she comes home, bandaged after cosmetic surgery, nothing is like before. The children start to doubt that this woman is actually their mother. An existential struggle for identity and fundamental trust emerges.

sample.title: Alibi.com 2
sample.plot: Greg's life had been pretty quiet after the agency closed, until he decides to propose to Flo and has to introduce her to his crooked father and ex-actress mother. With no choice but to reopen the agency and find fake parents.

sample.title: Good Luck to You, Leo Grande
sample.plot: Nancy Stokes, a retired school teacher, is yearning for some adventure, and some sex. And she has a plan, which involves hiring a young sex worker named Leo Grande.

sample.title: Wedding Unplanned
sample.plot: When Alexia finds a wedding-planner's business card in her boyfriend Mathias' pocket, she assumes that he is planning a proposal and instantly says yes. However, the business card was actually for Mathias's mistress, who is now hired to plan his unwanted wedding.

sample.title: Bye Bye Morons
sample.plot: When 43-year-old hairdresser Suze Trappet finds out that she's seriously ill, she decides to go looking for a child she was forced to abandon when she was only 15. On her madcap bureaucratic quest she crosses paths with JB, a 50-year-old man in the middle of a burnout, and Mr. Blin, a blind archivist prone to overenthusiasm. The unlikely trio set off on a hilarious and poignant helter-skelter journey across the city in search of Suze's long-lost child.

sample.title: A Christmas Masquerade
sample.plot: When she is mistaken for her boss at a Masquerade ball by a businessman, she continues the ruse over Christmas. Her mission is to secure him as a client. When his own motivations are revealed, they both realize, it just might be l...

sample.title: Me Before You
sample.plot: Lou Clark knows lots of things. She knows how many footsteps there are between the bus stop and home. She knows she likes working in The Buttered Bun tea shop and she knows she might not love her boyfriend Patrick. What Lou doesn't know is she's about to lose her job or that knowing what's coming is what keeps her sane. Will Traynor knows a road accident took away his desire to live. He knows everything feels very small and rather joyless now and he knows exactly how he's going to put a stop to that. What Will doesn't know is that Lou is about to burst into his world in a riot of color. And neither of them knows they're going to change each other for all time.

sample.title: Rebel
sample.plot: A portrayal of a family torn apart over a little Muslim boy's future.

categories.label: phones and feeds shape public truth
categories.description: Much of social life now passes through screens where rumour, outrage, intimacy, and reputation travel faster than any formal authority can answer. What you'll see: message alerts, viral accusations, scrolling timelines, leaked posts, and private lives suddenly exposed to a crowd.

categories.label: security states watch crowded European cities
categories.description: European capitals live with routine precautions against terrorism, organised violence, and political unrest, with cameras, barriers, armed units, and intelligence services folded into ordinary life. What you'll see: cordoned streets, police briefings, surveillance rooms, official motorcades, and public spaces treated as potential targets.

categories.label: precarious urban life behind stylish façades
categories.description: Beneath polished flats, fashionable districts, and cultivated taste, many people are strained by debt, insecure work, rising rents, and the fear of slipping down the social ladder. What you'll see: cramped apartments, anxious money talk, side hustles, elite restaurants beside financial worry, and comfort that feels one missed payment from collapse.

categories.label: care for the old moves homeward
categories.description: As populations age, families and paid carers shoulder more of the burden of decline, illness, and memory loss within private households rather than grand institutions. What you'll see: adapted living rooms, medication routines, tense visits from children, hired caregivers, and homes turning into places of supervision.

categories.label: therapy, diagnosis, and self-scrutiny everywhere
categories.description: Modern Europeans move through a culture that explains distress through counselling, trauma, diagnosis, and mental health language, even when certainty remains elusive. What you'll see: consulting rooms, guarded confessions, medical files, careful talk about boundaries, and everyday behaviour interpreted through inner wounds.

categories.label: courts and paperwork rule intimate lives
categories.description: Domestic conflict, inheritance, custody, illness, and sudden death are increasingly handled through legal procedure, official records, and professional experts. What you'll see: hearings, testimony, case files, forms, interpreters of evidence, and family grief filtered through institutional process.

categories.label: old churches persist beside secular habits
categories.description: Europe is largely secular in daily custom, yet older religious structures still endure as moral scenery, ritual authority, and a language for evil, guilt, and miracle. What you'll see: priests and nuns, church interiors, sacred rites, family ceremonies, and belief returning at moments of fear or crisis.

categories.label: migration and mixed identities reshape belonging
categories.description: Family histories, race, empire, and cross-border movement have made European identity more layered, with belonging negotiated between local roots and wider worlds. What you'll see: multilingual households, immigrant shopkeepers, adopted or mixed-background children, border-crossing backstories, and friction between national myths and lived diversity.

categories.label: celebrity and performance bleed into everyday life
categories.description: Fame, sport, media, and curated self-presentation press ordinary people to treat their bodies and biographies as things to be managed, displayed, and judged. What you'll see: film sets, football branding, cosmetic alteration, image-conscious talk, glamorous surfaces, and people measuring themselves against public visibility.

categories.label: weekend mobility knits the continent together
categories.description: Cheap flights, fast roads, and easy border crossings make Europe a landscape of short breaks, destination weddings, city-hopping work, and lives split between countries. What you'll see: airport lounges, rental cars, holiday apartments, motorway stops, tourists in old city centres, and families moving between London, Paris, the coast, and the islands.
